arts.ttl: Blackburn Rovers reveal Burnley's away ticket allocation for East Lancs derby

arts.ttl: Archie Gray let down after 10-month wait on Patrick Bamford verdict in Leeds United notebook
arts.sum: In the immediate aftermath of the game, Bamford said Archie Gray excitedly told him it would be shortlisted for the FIFA Puskas Award, the prize for the best goal scored in world football between August 2023 and August 2024. 2024 began with Patrick Bamford scoring the best goal of his career as Leeds United defeated Peterborough United in the FA Cup.

arts.ttl: Leeds United rivalling Red Bull duo for 18-y/o midfielder at UK club
arts.sum: Leeds United rivalling Red Bull Salzburg, RB Leipzig and Celtic for Lennon Miller Leeds United are said to be one of multiple clubs across Europe eyeing a move to sign Motherwell starlet Lennon Miller in 2025.

arts.ttl: Mind games begin as Leeds United can ignore ‘ridiculous’ regime jibe to stay ahead of rivals
arts.sum: The big game in the Championship actually gets under way on Friday night, as two teams famed for their red and white stripes - Sheffield United and Sunderland - go head to head. Frank Lampard will return to an EFL dugout for the first time since 2019 this weekend when he takes charge of his first match as Coventry City head coach on Saturday.

arts.ttl: FIFA Puskas Award: No Bamford is an insult to Leeds man
arts.sum: Leeds United striker Patrick Bamford can count himself incredibly unlucky that he has not been nominated for the 2024 Puskas Award for his stunning volley against Peterborough United. On Thursday evening, FIFA opened the voting for this year’s Puskas Award, a celebration of “spectacular” goals scored during the qualifying period.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou left in awe of Archie Gray after what ex-Leeds United star did against Roma
arts.sum: As Leeds United fans know only too well, Archie Gray is capable of performing well in multiple positions. By joining the Leeds United community on WhatsApp, you'll see the biggest and best stories as soon as they happen.

arts.ttl: Why Blackburn Rovers vs Leeds United has been given unusual Championship kick-off time
arts.sum: In a statement, the police said: "Lancashire Police requested the kick-off time for the Blackburn Rovers versus Leeds United fixture on Saturday, November 30 be brought forward to 1.30pm to minimise the risk of alcohol-related anti-social behaviour. arts.ttl: 'We know' - Leeds United boss makes Blackburn Rovers 'top-six' admission
arts.sum: Daniel Farke is expecting a tough afternoon for Leeds United at Ewood Park

arts.ttl: Pundit: Rangers may make permanent Gelhardt, Leeds bid
arts.sum: Leeds United forward Joe Gelhardt is the most likely January exit from Elland Road, with Rangers one of several clubs already forming a queue. Those clubs include Scottish giants Rangers, as well as Championship rivals Plymouth Argyle, Stoke City, Preston, and Portsmouth.
